heading: Lower Duck Creek vs Lower Lewis Ponds — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lower Duck Creek, New South Wales and Lower Lewis Ponds, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lower Lewis Ponds has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Lower Duck Creek (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lower Duck Creek or Lower Lewis Ponds safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lower Duck Creek has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Lower Lewis Ponds scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lower Duck Creek scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Lower Lewis Ponds scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lower Duck Creek or Lower Lewis Ponds?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lower Lewis Ponds has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
